example.name: creating_a_wizard_step
example.scenario: The user requests a new step for the Jailbreak wizard to confirm device compatibility.
example.user_request: Create the first step of the jailbreak wizard to show compatibility info.

step.approach: Identify that this requires a `WizardStep.svelte` layout and use of the `var(--color-bg-secondary)` for cards.
Create `src/lib/components/wizard/JailbreakCompatibilityStep.svelte`. Use Svelte 5 `$props()` to accept device info. Style using macOS design tokens.

example.completion: I've created the JailbreakCompatibilityStep component utilizing Svelte 5 runes and macOS design tokens for the card layout.
